sentences.arabic: وَجَدَ نَاصِرٌ كَنْزًا صَغِيرًا مَدْفُونًا فِي حَدِيقَةِ الْمَدْرَسَةِ.
sentences.translation: Nasir je pronašao mali zakopani blago u školskom vrtu.
sentences.translationEn: Nasir found a small buried treasure in the school garden.
It was a small wooden box.

sentences.arabic: فَتَحَهُ وَوَجَدَ فِيهِ أَحْجَارًا جَمِيلَةَ الْأَلْوَانِ.
sentences.translation: Otvorio ga je i pronašao u njemu šareno kamenje.
sentences.translationEn: He opened it and found colourful stones inside it.

sentences.translation: Obavijestio je učitelja o tome što je pronašao.
sentences.translationEn: He told his teacher what he had found.

sentences.arabic: قَالَ الْمُعَلِّمُ: تَلَامِيذُ قَدِيمُونَ دَفَنُوهُ هُنَا قَبْلَ سَنَوَاتٍ.
sentences.translation: Učitelj je rekao: Stari učenici su ga zakopali ovdje prije godina.
sentences.translationEn: The teacher said: Old pupils buried it here years ago.
